title: Lilin Angel
wikitext:
[]: Lilin =/= Angel(?)             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Mar 20, 2011 11:03 am At some point in EoE, Misato explains to Shinji that Angels and Humanity are all the same, and that mankind is the final Angel. But, wait a second. Lilith, the progenitor of Humanity, isn't even an Angel. Evapedia Lilith Page wrote: The other Angels are the progeny of Adam, but Lilith is the progenitor of the "Lilim": humans. Thus is is actually somewhat misleading that Lilith has been designated as the "Second Angel", and indeed strictly speaking, it would be proper to say that Lilith is not an "Angel".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 20, 2011 12:13 pm There are three maintenance templates topping Lilith's page right now. That's a big neon sign saying, "This page is a mess and you shouldn't take its contents too seriously." Guess I better hop on that clean-up... The Lilin page addresses the Lilin vs. Lillim thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Mar 20, 2011 3:38 pm Mkay. I shall wait for it by dancing.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Wed Mar 23, 2011 9:31 pm Something that should not be forgiven: - Lilims were giants: if you are christian and read the bible (too much), then yes you should believe in giants (lol) - the Lilims case is the only one about angels copulating with humans: orthodoxs believe this to be proof of the material nature of angels and devils, and also that angels are male or female; catholics dispute this to be a one of a kind scenario in the bible unable to generalize

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 24, 2011 12:25 am You're thinking of Nephilim. Lilim are never referred to by name in the Bible; they're found only in the Talmud.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Thu Mar 24, 2011 11:22 am xdiesp wrote: - Lilims were giants: if you are christian and read the bible (too much), then yes you should believe in giants (lol)

Article: Lilin Angel
[]: Lilin =/= Angel(?)             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Mar 20, 2011 11:03 am At some point in EoE, Misato explains to Shinji that Angels and Humanity are all the same, and that mankind is the final Angel. But, wait a second. Lilith, the progenitor of Humanity, isn't even an Angel. Evapedia Lilith Page wrote: The other Angels are the progeny of Adam, but Lilith is the progenitor of the "Lilim": humans. Thus is is actually somewhat misleading that Lilith has been designated as the "Second Angel", and indeed strictly speaking, it would be proper to say that Lilith is not an "Angel".
